3178900.name: GGWG: Goose Game Without Goose
3178900.description:
Roll-and-Move race boardgame where you become a intrepid hero on a quest to free the kingdom from an evil enemy.

You will control your adventurer's moves and actions thrugh a gloomy abandoned castle, up to the last room.

Monsters and traps will try to stop you from reaching your goal and other valiant paladins will race you to the glory.

So, roll the dice. Your quest awaits!

  • Advance in the castle, reach the last tile and be the first player to defeat the final boss!

  • Strategically use 4, 6 and 8 sided dice to survive turn after turn!

  • Face skeletons, ghosts and the legendary Black Knight!

  • Get magical treasures like the Sacred Sword or the Lucky Amulet!

  • Use shortcuts to advance faster through the castle!

  • ...and above all, don't trust mirrors!

FEATURES

  • Strategically enanched Goose Game rules

  • Single player mode vs AI

  • Local multiplayer up to 3 players

  • 15+ playable characters

  • Unlockable Achievements

  • Holiday special gimmicks

  • Realistic dice rolls

  • Multiple languages

  • In-game tutorial

  • 20 minutes avarage playtime
